text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (Valentine's Day is almost here.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(At my old school, I would exchange chocolates
with my friends. Valentine's is so much fun!)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(But this year feels a little different. And I'm really
nervous. I mean, how could I not be...)

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! So you're giving chocolates to your trainer,
Flower?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Mm-hmm! It's my way of expressing thanks for
everything Trainer does for me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But I don't know what kind of chocolates adults
like...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Mayano, you seem really grown-up, so please
give me some advice!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You think I'm grown-up?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh! Copy that! ☆ You're in for a safe flight
with Captain Maya!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Commencing Operation: Enchanting Grown-up
Valentine's! ☆

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(The days leading up to Valentine's just got a
whole lot busier.)

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Time for our first mission: Grown-up Taste
Analysis!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
According to this magazine, adults prefer bitter
chocolate with rich, complex flavors!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Right, that makes sense...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I've seen my trainer drinking coffee before, too.
Perhaps I'll try going for a slightly bitter flavor!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Now for mission two: Playing Mind Games!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Adults never express their honest feelings! I saw a
TV show where they said keeping the other
person guessing is the best way to get them
interested!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Mind games, hmm...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...Oh! A surprise certainly sounds like fun! A little
while back, I saw Trainer get a real shock after
running into a colleague unexpectedly...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Despite being so stunned, Trainer was smiling a
lot. It was such a wonderful smile too!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I could add a second layer of chocolates
to the box? I'll have to think up something clever!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time for the third and final mission:
Crafting an Enchanting Atmosphere!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
When giving someone chocolates, the mood has
to be just right! So I researched the most popular
grown-up date spots online and sent you a list!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Wow... Thank you so much! They all look really
nice...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Ah, this restaurant!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
That place caught your eye, did it? The night
views are supposed to be really pretty! ☆

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, um... Right across from there is a park full of
gorgeous canola flowers.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Trainer's never told me directly, but... Let's just
say I think my trainer likes pretty things.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'd like to take Trainer there someday...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Sorry! That doesn't have anything to do with the
restaurant, does it?! Umm, it seems to have a
great atmosphere.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I've noticed this for quite a while, Flower, but you
sure pay a lot of attention to your trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Do you think so?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm always thinking about whether there's
anything I can help Trainer with. Maybe that's
why?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...I think I've just figured it all out.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Flower! Forget everything you've learned
on our missions!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! But why? You worked so hard on this
operation, Mayano...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Well, um, I messed up. It made me really happy
when you called me grown-up... and I got fixated
on appearances and all that surface-level
nonsense.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I think you already understand this stuff way more
than I do.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
So the best strategy is to just go with what feels
right to you. I'm sure that's what would make your
trainer happiest!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...If that's what you think, then I'll trust your
judgment. I'll take your advice and do things my
way.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But, Mayano, I think you're wrong about one
thing...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You didn't mess up at all! All your missions were
so grown-up and made my heart pound with
excitement!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Also, they were a lot of fun. I can't thank you
enough!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you're welcome! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You've got this, Flower! I'll be cheering for you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Right! Thank you again!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (I'll be ready for the big day.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Happy Valentine's Day, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Please accept this gift as a thank-you for always
being there for me!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (I gave Trainer chocolates my way! ♪)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You know what, Mayano? I'll still carry out all the
missions!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Why? I had you set on the wrong flight path.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: No, you were right on target!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I really had no idea how to make a grown-up like
my trainer happy with my gift...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But you helped me brainstorm and come up with a
lot of great ideas!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
And that's why... it's time for Mission Four: Gift
Giving, the Flower Way!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'll carry out all the missions. That way, I'll be
putting your advice to good use, and Trainer and
I will both be happy!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Flower... You're so kind...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Mission complete! You're a high-flying grown-up
now, Flower. Get out there and make everything
perfect!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I will! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Finally, the big day arrives...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Happy Valentine's Day, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I know you've enjoyed my cooking many times
until now, but...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
A friend helped me come up with the idea for
these chocolates, and I think they're my tastiest
creation yet!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I made them my own way with just a touch of grown-up flavor. Please enjoy them! ♪
